3004070.name: Lusófona Games Collection 2024
3004070.description:
Lusófona Games Collection 2024 is a curated bundle showcasing the best student projects developed during the past academic year at Lusófona University. This collection highlights five games created in events and project classes within the Videogames bachelor’s degree program. Play the games and watch the developer commentary to take a behind-the-scenes look at our students' journey to becoming the next generation of videogame developers.

Featured games:
  • Inside Poetry Remastered - First Year
  • Human Ltd. - Second Year
  • Magical Intern - Second Year
  • PodScape - Second Year
  • Shades of Insanity - Third Year

Please be mindful that these game experiences are small vertical slices that showcase the essential features and gameplay elements, but do not represent final products.

Hope you enjoy them as much as we do!
